title: Default Email Notification Settings for Entire account
excerpt: It would be nice to be able to set default email notification settings for all new users in an account. Currently with every new user, I have to change the email notification settings manually for every individual. They …

posts.author: Hstaab (Hillary Staab)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to be able to set default email notification settings for all new users in an account. Currently with every new user, I have to change the email notification settings manually for every individual. They all are adjusted to the same selections, I would like to have a default setting that automatically presets with the admin selections for every new user. I imagine this would fall in the Customization area under Admin, then in the user profile.
